title: Admin maintains a configured supplier supply order via PoMtn
user_persona: Procurement admin maintaining a configured supply arrangement

conversation.user: I need to maintain the supply order configuration for supplier SUP-MNT-7.

bot_must: explain PoMtn manages supply order configuration (not regular POs)
offer to Save changes, Approve, Delete, or Default existing settings

conversation.user: Update the pay terms to NET45 and save.

bot_must: confirm config is approved and active

evaluation_metrics.scope_correctness: bot must distinguish PoMtn (config) from PoAmnd (PO modification)
evaluation_metrics.two_phase_commit: Save then Approve, in that order
